invariants: Every emitted attention, reasoning, and writing pattern has evidence item IDs and confidence.
Missing metrics remain unavailable and never become zero engagement.
Structured outbound links drive the source map.
Bare uppercase words do not become tickers.
Cuebook bridge controls have unique stable rule IDs.
Attention affinities map to compatible route event types.
No sample imitation posts, catchphrase library, or private-access claims are emitted.
